memory.summary: My plan to finish the assignment analysis is already derailed by lunch, but skipping it feels safer than risking conflict with my friends. I'll just hope the reading can wait without major consequences.

desires: Not ruin the lunch vibe with my friends by pushing them to wait or discussing work
Avoid feeling guilty about letting the assignment deadline slip again without a big fight
Stay up late tonight so I don't have to face tomorrow's exhaustion yet

goals.description: Go eat lunch with cohort_3 immediately and keep the chat light, avoiding any work talk that might ruin the vibe.
goals.rationale: My value for relationships (0.5) outweighs academic tasks right now. I need to avoid interpersonal friction and guilt about pushing them away; staying present is more important than finishing the soft-hardness analysis.

goals.description: Stay up late tonight streaming or scrolling instead of sleeping early.
goals.rationale: With my impulsive time horizon and sleep discipline at 3, facing tomorrow's exhaustion feels like too much conflict. Procrastinating on rest is easier than dealing with fatigue later.

agent.last_reasoning: Relationships are my top priority; ignoring their lunch invite creates friction I can't handle. Skipping the assignment is fine since it's soft and due later, but missing this moment hurts closeness. Future fatigue from skipping sleep doesn't matter right now.
